posts.text:
A shuttered theme park in Niagara Falls tried to send 30 beluga whales to China. When its export permit was denied, the park threatened to kill the animals. 

On “The Weekend Intelligence” podcast, we report on the trouble at Marineland https://www.economist.com/podcasts/2026/03/07/the-last-whales-at-marineland?taid=69ac2861155caf0001a2566b&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist
